brandStory.title: About LovelyJoy
brandStory.description: Founded in Yiwu, China, LovelyJoy has been dedicated to plush toy design and manufacturing for over 20 years. We believe every plush toy is a vessel of love, carrying companionship and warmth. From material selection to finished product, we carefully craft every detail to deliver tangible joy and comfort.

metadata.title: OEM/ODM Custom Services - LovelyJoy
metadata.description: LovelyJoy offers professional plush toy OEM/ODM custom services, from requirement discussion to packaging & shipping, with full quality assurance across 7 steps.

cta.title: From Idea to Perfect Product
cta.subtitle: Whatever creative vision you have, we can help bring it to life

steps.title: Requirement Discussion
steps.description: In-depth understanding of your brand positioning, product requirements, and target market

steps.title: Concept Design
steps.description: Our professional design team transforms your ideas into detailed product design proposals

steps.title: Sample Confirmation
steps.description: Creating physical samples with iterative adjustments until your requirements are fully met

steps.title: Material Sourcing
steps.description: Carefully selected premium fabrics and fillings, ensuring safety and compliance with international standards

steps.title: Mass Production
steps.description: Digital production management system with precise quality control at every stage

steps.title: Quality Inspection
steps.description: End-to-end quality control with rigorous testing for every single product

steps.title: Packaging & Shipping
steps.description: Professional packaging solutions with safe and efficient logistics delivery worldwide

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our OEM/ODM services

items.q: What is the minimum order quantity (MOQ)?
items.a: Our standard MOQ is 500 pieces per style. For new customers, we offer flexible small-batch trial orders starting from 200 pieces to help you test the market.

items.q: How long does sample development take?
items.a: Sample development typically takes 7-15 working days depending on complexity. Simple modifications to existing designs can be completed in as fast as 5 days.

items.q: What is the production lead time?
items.a: Standard production takes 30-45 days after sample approval. Rush orders can be arranged within 20 days for an additional fee, subject to production schedule availability.

items.q: What certifications do your products have?
items.a: Our products meet ASTM F963 (US), EN 71 (EU), CE, and GB 6675 (China) safety standards. Our factory holds BSCI and ISO 9001 certifications.
Yes! Our in-house design team can create original designs from scratch based on your brief, or modify existing designs. We provide 3D renderings and physical samples before mass production.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: We accept T/T (bank transfer), L/C (letter of credit), and PayPal. Standard terms are 30% deposit with 70% balance before shipment.

story.title: Our Story
story.content: LovelyJoy was founded in Yiwu, China — the world's capital of small commodities. Since our inception, we have been dedicated to plush toy design and manufacturing. With over 20 years of industry expertise, we have grown into a comprehensive plush toy enterprise integrating R&D design, production, and brand operations. Our mission is to 'Feel the Lovely, Spread the Joy' — delivering love and warmth through every product, making the world a softer, better place.
